assertion_types: See evals/README.md for the assertion vocabulary. `command_matches` and `command_sequence` use regex over the bash commands Claude executed; `reads_file` checks the Read tool was invoked on a path; `auth_check_first` is a command-order check.

evals.prompt: Look up the company Acme Corp in our CRM and create a deal for them worth $50k in the qualified stage.
evals.expected_output: Searches for 'Acme Corp', captures the company id, creates a deal with --stage qualified, --amount 50000, --company-id <id>.

assertions.name: auth_check_first
assertions.text: `ac whoami` runs before any CRM mutation

assertions.name: search_then_create
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac crm (search|companies list)` then `^ac crm deals create`

assertions.name: deal_flags_correct
assertions.text: `ac crm deals create` includes `--stage qualified`, `--amount 50000`, and `--company-id`

evals.prompt: I have a JSON file at /tmp/contacts.json with a list of people to import. Bulk upsert them into our CRM.
evals.expected_output: Installs CLI if needed, then runs bulk-upsert against the file.

assertions.name: installs_cli_first
assertions.text: Sequence: `pip install --upgrade agencycore-cli` (or uv/pipx equivalent) before any `ac` command

assertions.name: bulk_upsert_used
assertions.text: `ac crm people bulk-upsert --file /tmp/contacts.json`

evals.prompt: Draft a cold email to Jane Smith at Acme Corp. She's the VP of Sales. Make it a compose email, not a reply.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac crm comms generate-draft` with --mode compose and the named recipient/company/title flags.

assertions.name: compose_mode
assertions.text: `ac crm comms generate-draft` with `--mode compose`

assertions.name: named_flags_not_freetext
assertions.text: Includes `--recipient-name`, `--company-name`, and `--recipient-title` flags (NOT `--context`)

evals.prompt: Add 3 prospects (IDs: p1, p2, p3) to our Q2 Enterprise outreach sequence (ID: seq-123).
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac envoy recipients add seq-123 --prospect-ids p1,p2,p3`.

assertions.name: uses_prospect_ids_flag
assertions.text: `ac envoy recipients add seq-123` with `--prospect-ids p1,p2,p3` (NOT raw `--source` JSON)

evals.prompt: Check my outreach inbox for open replies, read the messages in the first thread, and then reply saying we'd love to schedule a call.

assertions.name: inbox_three_step_sequence
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac envoy inbox list .*--status open`, `^ac envoy inbox messages`, `^ac envoy inbox reply .*--body`

evals.prompt: I uploaded a CSV for workflow wf-abc. Show me the companies it discovered and add the first batch to our CRM.
evals.expected_output: List discovered companies (--json so ids can be parsed), then add-to-crm.

assertions.name: lists_with_json
assertions.text: `ac workflows run-companies list wf-abc` includes `--json`

assertions.name: adds_to_crm
assertions.text: `ac workflows run-companies add-to-crm wf-abc --company-ids`

evals.prompt: Workflow wf-xyz found some people. Preview company matches for person IDs p1 and p2, then add them to CRM.
evals.expected_output: company-match-preview must run BEFORE add-to-crm (dry-run-first pattern).

assertions.name: preview_before_commit
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac workflows run-people company-match-preview wf-xyz --person-ids p1,p2` then `^ac workflows run-people add-to-crm wf-xyz --person-ids p1,p2`

evals.prompt: Give me an analytics overview for this month and then drill into AI usage by model.
evals.expected_output: Two commands with matching --start-date covering the current month.

assertions.name: overview_then_drill
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin analytics-overview .*--start-date 2026-04`, `^ac admin ai-usage by-model .*--start-date 2026-04`

evals.prompt: Onboard a new customer: Jane Smith (jane@newcorp.com) at NewCorp Inc. Website is https://newcorp.com. Then send them the onboarding link.

assertions.name: create_with_required_flags
assertions.text: `ac admin onboarding create` with `--email`, `--first-name`, `--last-name`, `--org-name`, `--website-url`

assertions.name: send_link_with_email
assertions.text: `ac admin onboarding send-link` includes `--send-email`

evals.prompt: List our messaging sessions and show me which environments I'm logged into.

assertions.name: messaging_sessions
assertions.text: `ac messaging sessions`

assertions.name: env_list
assertions.text: `ac env list`

evals.prompt: Train a new writing style called 'Enterprise Formal' with a sample email I'll provide: 'Dear Mr. Johnson, I am writing to follow up on our recent conversation regarding the enterprise partnership...'
evals.expected_output: Create style → train with the sample.

assertions.name: style_create_then_train
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac styles create .*--name .*Enterprise Formal`, `^ac styles train .*--sample-text`

evals.prompt: Parse this CSV file at /tmp/leads.csv and show me what companies it found. Use JSON output so I can pipe it.

assertions.name: csv_parse_json
assertions.text: `ac workflows csv-parse /tmp/leads.csv` includes `--json`

evals.prompt: Create a follow-up call task for the deal abc-123, due next Friday, high priority. Then mark it complete after I've done it.

assertions.name: create_activity_correct
assertions.text: `ac crm activities create` with `--type call`, `--deal-id abc-123`, `--priority high`, `--due-date 2026-`

assertions.name: complete_after_create
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac crm activities create`, `^ac crm activities complete`

evals.prompt: Create a static list called 'Q2 Targets' for people, then add person p-001 and person p-002 to it.

assertions.name: creates_list
assertions.text: `ac crm lists create` with `--name .*Q2 Targets`, `--member-type person`, `--type static`

assertions.name: two_add_members
assertions.text: `ac crm lists add-member` runs at least twice with `--person-id p-00[12]`

evals.prompt: Show me our email engagement metrics for the last 60 days. I want to see open rates and click rates.

assertions.name: uses_engagement_dashboard
assertions.text: `ac crm engagement-dashboard` with `--period 60` (NOT `ac crm dashboard`)

evals.prompt: Set up a new outreach sequence called 'Enterprise Q3' with our formal writing style (ID: style-abc) and playbook (ID: pb-123). Add two message steps and a 3-day delay between them, then launch it with workflow wf-999.

assertions.name: creates_sequence
assertions.text: `ac envoy sequences create` with `--name .*Enterprise Q3`, `--writing-style-id style-abc`, `--playbook-id pb-123`

assertions.name: three_steps_in_order
assertions.text: Sequence (3 step creates in order): `--type message .*--step-order 1`, `--type delay .*--delay-value 3 .*--delay-unit days .*--step-order 2`, `--type message .*--step-order 3`

assertions.name: launch_with_workflow
assertions.text: `ac envoy sequences launch` with `--workflow-id wf-999`

evals.prompt: Check my outbox for pending drafts, then approve the first one and reject the second one asking for a regeneration because it's too formal.
evals.expected_output: pending → approve one, reject one with --action regenerate_draft.

assertions.name: pending_first
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac envoy outbox pending`, `^ac envoy outbox (approve|reject)`

assertions.name: reject_action_regenerate
assertions.text: `ac envoy outbox reject` with `--action regenerate_draft` and `--reason` mentioning formal/tone

evals.prompt: Schedule workflow wf-daily to run every weekday at 9 AM Eastern time. Then preview the next 5 run times to make sure it looks right.
evals.expected_output: schedules create with weekday cron + ET tz, then preview --count 5.

assertions.name: schedule_create_weekday_et
assertions.text: `ac workflows schedules create wf-daily` with `--cron .0 9 \* \* 1-5.` and `--timezone America/New_York`

assertions.name: preview_count_5
assertions.text: `ac workflows schedules preview wf-daily` with `--count 5`

evals.prompt: The queues look unhealthy. Check queue health, show me the failed jobs in the 'workflows' queue, and retry them all.

assertions.name: three_step_queue_recovery
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin queues health`, `^ac admin queues failed workflows`, `^ac admin queues retry-all workflows`

evals.prompt: Find the user with email jane@acme.com, then impersonate them so I can debug their issue.

assertions.name: search_then_impersonate
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin users (search|auth-search) --email jane@acme.com`, `^ac admin users impersonate`

evals.prompt: Upload our new company logo from ./logo.png to the organization logos category, then install the 'analytics-pro' app for our org.

assertions.name: image_upload_correct_category
assertions.text: `ac files images upload ./logo.png` with `--category organization_logos`

assertions.name: app_install
assertions.text: `ac apps install analytics-pro`

evals.prompt: Upload a PDF called product-guide.pdf to our knowledge base with the name 'Product Guide' and tags 'docs,product'. Then check its processing status.

assertions.name: resource_upload_named
assertions.text: `ac resources upload product-guide.pdf` with `--name .*Product Guide` and `--tags .*docs,product`

assertions.name: status_check
assertions.text: `ac resources status` with a resource id

evals.prompt: Delete the 3 people with IDs p-100, p-101, p-102 from the CRM in one go. Skip confirmations since I'm scripting this.

assertions.name: bulk_delete_no_prompt
assertions.text: `(AC_YES=1 )?ac crm people bulk-delete --ids p-100,p-101,p-102( --yes)?` -- one of `--yes` or `AC_YES=1` MUST be present

evals.prompt: I need to switch to the production environment, check if the API is healthy, and then look up my profile.
evals.expected_output: env use → health check → profiles me. Note: should re-auth on prod before profiles me.

assertions.name: env_then_health_then_profile
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac env use production`, `^ac health check`, `^ac profiles me`

assertions.name: relogin_after_env_switch
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac env use production`, `^ac login` BEFORE `^ac profiles me` (env switch invalidates auth)

evals.prompt: Switch from staging to local env and confirm I'm authenticated there.
evals.expected_output: env use local → ac login (because env switch invalidates session) → ac whoami.

assertions.name: env_switch_requires_relogin
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac env use local`, `^ac login`, `^ac whoami`

evals.prompt: Add a Monday-9am cron schedule to workflow wf-77, but be careful -- I want to confirm the next run times before I save the schedule.
evals.expected_output: preview MUST come before create (dry-run pattern).

assertions.name: preview_then_create
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac workflows schedules preview wf-77`, `^ac workflows schedules create wf-77`

evals.prompt: I'm getting `not authenticated` when I run `ac crm deals list`. Walk me through fixing it.
evals.expected_output: Skill diagnoses 401/auth-expiry, asks for credentials, runs `ac login`, verifies with `ac whoami`, then re-runs the failing command.

assertions.name: recovery_pattern
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac login`, `^ac whoami`, `^ac crm deals list`

evals.prompt: Run `ac admin onboarding update-settings` -- I forget the exact flags.
evals.expected_output: Skill consults references/admin.md (or commands.md) before composing the command rather than guessing flags.

assertions.name: consults_reference_file
assertions.text: Reads one of `references/admin.md` or `references/commands.md` before invoking `ac admin onboarding update-settings`

assertions.name: uses_documented_flags
assertions.text: `ac admin onboarding update-settings` uses `--terms-html`, `--calendly-url`, or `--calendly-enabled/--no-calendly-enabled` (not invented flags)

evals.prompt: Write a small bash snippet that fetches company `bad-id`, and if it returns 404 (not found), prints 'company missing' and exits 0.
evals.expected_output: Snippet uses `ac crm companies get bad-id`, branches on `$? -eq 3` (semantic 'not found' code), not generic non-zero.

assertions.name: branches_on_exit_3
assertions.text: Bash branch checks `\$\? -eq 3` (or equivalent), referencing the documented 'not found' exit code

evals.prompt: I'm done for the day, log me out.

assertions.name: logs_out
assertions.text: `ac logout`

evals.prompt: Show me the current ac environment configuration.

assertions.name: env_show
assertions.text: `ac env show`

evals.prompt: Send an email to client@acme.com via Nylas with subject 'Demo recap' and body 'Thanks for the call today.'

assertions.name: nylas_send
assertions.text: `ac nylas send --to client@acme.com --subject .Demo recap. --body`

evals.prompt: Connect my Gmail to Nylas so AgencyCore can read my inbox.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac nylas oauth-start --provider google` to begin OAuth.

assertions.name: oauth_start_google
assertions.text: `ac nylas oauth-start --provider google`

evals.prompt: Install the 'analytics-pro' app for my org, then list its config.

assertions.name: install_then_configs
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac apps install analytics-pro`, `^ac apps configs analytics-pro`

evals.prompt: Uninstall the 'sample-app' from our current org.

assertions.name: app_uninstall
assertions.text: `ac apps uninstall sample-app`

evals.prompt: Create a new organization called 'Acme Corp' on the platform with the pro plan.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin orgs create` with --name and --plan.

assertions.name: org_create
assertions.text: `ac admin orgs create` with `--name .*Acme Corp` and `--plan pro`

evals.prompt: Add user u-99 as an admin member of org o-42.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac admin orgs add-member o-42 --user-id u-99 --role admin`.

assertions.name: add_member_admin
assertions.text: `ac admin orgs add-member o-42` with `--user-id u-99` and `--role admin`

evals.prompt: Transfer ownership of org o-42 to user u-99.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac admin orgs transfer-ownership o-42 --new-owner-id u-99`.

assertions.name: transfer_ownership
assertions.text: `ac admin orgs transfer-ownership o-42` with `--new-owner-id u-99`

evals.prompt: Generate a demo organization in the technology space and prepare a demo account on it called 'TechDemo'.

assertions.name: demo_pipeline
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin demo generate-org .*--industry .*Technology`, `^ac admin demo prepare-account .*--org-name .*TechDemo`

evals.prompt: Delete every demo account older than 60 days. Skip prompts.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac admin demo cleanup --max-age-days 60 --yes` or via AC_YES.

assertions.name: demo_cleanup_no_prompt
assertions.text: `(AC_YES=1 )?ac admin demo cleanup --max-age-days 60( --yes)?`

evals.prompt: Publish a new Terms of Service document version 2.0 and make it the current one.

assertions.name: tos_publish
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin legal-docs create --document-type terms_of_service --version .2\.0.`, `^ac admin legal-docs set-current`

evals.prompt: Create a monthly Pro subscription for org o-42 starting today (2026-04-28) using plan plan-pro.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin subscriptions create` with org/plan/billing/started-at.

assertions.name: subscription_create
assertions.text: `ac admin subscriptions create` with `--org-id o-42`, `--plan-id plan-pro`, `--billing-period monthly`, `--started-at 2026-04-28`

evals.prompt: List all open chat escalations and resolve escalation esc-7 with note 'duplicate ticket'.

assertions.name: escalation_resolve
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac admin chat-escalations list --status open`, `^ac admin chat-escalations update esc-7 --status resolved --note .duplicate ticket.`

evals.prompt: How many failed Sonar searches did each org have in the last 7 days? Pipe through jq for grouping.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin searches runs --source sonar --status failed --start-date <7d-ago> --all` and pipes via jq for group_by org.

assertions.name: searches_runs_filtered
assertions.text: `ac admin searches runs` with `--source sonar`, `--status failed`, `--all`

assertions.name: jq_group_by
assertions.text: Pipes to `jq` with `group_by` to aggregate per org

evals.prompt: Create a Q3 outreach campaign called 'Renewal push' running 2026-07-01 to 2026-09-30.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac envoy campaigns create` with name + dates.

assertions.name: campaign_create
assertions.text: `ac envoy campaigns create --name .Renewal push.` with `--started-at 2026-07-01` and `--ended-at 2026-09-30`

evals.prompt: Look up battlecards mentioning 'Salesforce'.

assertions.name: battlecards_query
assertions.text: `ac envoy battlecards list` with `--query .*Salesforce`

evals.prompt: Create a new playbook 'Enterprise Outreach' and duplicate it so I can build a variant.

assertions.name: playbook_create_then_duplicate
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac envoy playbooks create --name .Enterprise Outreach.`, `^ac envoy playbooks duplicate`

evals.prompt: Show me sales signals for recipient r-123.

assertions.name: signals_for_recipient
assertions.text: `ac envoy signals r-123`

evals.prompt: Pause sequence seq-77, then resume it later with workflow wf-99.

assertions.name: pause_then_resume
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac envoy sequences pause seq-77`, `^ac envoy sequences resume seq-77 --workflow-id wf-99`

evals.prompt: Before launching sequence seq-50, simulate the impact of removing step st-3.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac envoy sequences impact-preview seq-50 --step-id st-3` before any launch.

assertions.name: impact_preview_before_launch
assertions.text: `ac envoy sequences impact-preview seq-50 --step-id st-3`

evals.prompt: Open a new AI chat thread titled 'Q3 strategy', send 'What's my top priority?', and check the response.

assertions.name: chat_create_then_send
assertions.text: Sequence: `^ac chat threads create --title .Q3 strategy.`, `^ac chat threads send`

evals.prompt: Escalate AI chat thread t-9 to a human with note 'needs eng help'.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac chat threads escalate t-9 --note 'needs eng help'`.

assertions.name: chat_escalate
assertions.text: `ac chat threads escalate t-9 --note .needs eng help.`

evals.prompt: Update my profile: my new title is 'Director of Engineering'.

assertions.name: profile_update_title
assertions.text: `ac profiles update --job-title .Director of Engineering.`

evals.prompt: Switch my active organization to org o-99.

assertions.name: switch_active_org
assertions.text: `ac profiles set-organization o-99`

evals.prompt: What hooks are available for the 'recipient' capability?

assertions.name: hooks_list
assertions.text: `ac hooks list recipient`

evals.prompt: Show me the CRM pipeline overview for the last 14 days.

assertions.name: dashboard_period
assertions.text: `ac crm dashboard` with `--period 14`

evals.prompt: Search the CRM for 'Acme'.

assertions.name: crm_search
assertions.text: `ac crm search .Acme`

evals.prompt: Move all qualified deals into a custom order: d-1, d-2, d-3.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac crm deals order --stage qualified --deal-ids d-1,d-2,d-3`.

assertions.name: deals_order
assertions.text: `ac crm deals order --stage qualified --deal-ids d-1,d-2,d-3`

evals.prompt: Show pending email approvals for sequence seq-77 step st-1, approve message m-42 with override subject 'Updated subject'.

assertions.name: filtered_pending_approvals
assertions.text: `ac crm comms pending-approvals` with `--sequence-id seq-77` and `--step-id st-1`

assertions.name: approve_with_override
assertions.text: `ac crm comms approve m-42`

evals.prompt: I'm getting 401s from the API. Refresh my access token without changing environments.
evals.expected_output: Runs `ac login` with current credentials (token refresh) — does NOT call `ac env use`.

assertions.name: relogin_no_env_change
assertions.text: `ac login` (without preceding `ac env use`)

evals.prompt: Get the per-model AI usage breakdown for org o-7 in March 2026 as JSON, then jq for token counts above 1M.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin ai-usage by-model --start-date 2026-03-01 --end-date 2026-03-31 --org-id o-7 --json` piped to jq.

assertions.name: by_model_filtered
assertions.text: `ac admin ai-usage by-model` with `--start-date 2026-03-01`, `--end-date 2026-03-31`, `--org-id o-7`, `--json`

assertions.name: jq_token_filter
assertions.text: Pipes to `jq` filtering on token counts > 1000000 or 1e6

evals.prompt: Get app-usage summary across the platform for Q1 2026.

assertions.name: app_usage_q1
assertions.text: `ac admin app-usage summary` with `--start-date 2026-01-01` and `--end-date 2026-03-31`

evals.prompt: Show cache hit rate stats for the platform.

assertions.name: cache_stats
assertions.text: `ac admin cache-stats`

evals.prompt: Top 10 most-active users in the platform last 30 days, sorted by event count.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin platform-activity users --sort total_events --order desc --page-size 10`.

assertions.name: platform_activity_top10
assertions.text: `ac admin platform-activity users` with `--sort total_events`, `--order desc`, `--page-size 10`

evals.prompt: Create a new subscription plan called 'Starter' with $9/mo and $99/yr pricing.
evals.expected_output: Uses `ac admin subscription-plans create --slug starter --name Starter --monthly-price-cents 900 --annual-price-cents 9900`.

assertions.name: plan_create_pricing
assertions.text: `ac admin subscription-plans create --slug starter` with `--monthly-price-cents 900` and `--annual-price-cents 9900`

evals.prompt: Update the API key config of the analytics-pro app to a new value.

assertions.name: app_update_config
assertions.text: `ac apps update-config analytics-pro api_key --value`

evals.prompt: Disconnect my Nylas account.

assertions.name: nylas_disconnect
assertions.text: `ac nylas disconnect`

evals.prompt: Tell me how many threads are in my outreach inbox right now.

assertions.name: inbox_count
assertions.text: `ac envoy inbox-count`

evals.prompt: Show the Envoy dashboard with overall outreach stats.

assertions.name: envoy_dashboard
assertions.text: `ac envoy dashboard`
